home.title: Create your listing
home.subtitle: Upload your photos and our AI will generate professional, SEO-friendly titles, descriptions, and suggested prices for your Vinted listings.

form.dragDrop: Drag & drop or use the buttons below
form.aiError: We got an error from the AI.
form.aiErrorHint: Please try again in a moment or check your connection.
form.aiErrorFull: We got an error from the AI. Please try again in a moment or check your connection.

result.title: Title
result.verifySitesHint: Check similar items on these e-commerce sites:
result.findProductLinksError: Could not load links. Try again.
result.emptyResultHint: Upload photos and provide basic details to see your optimized Vinted listing here.
result.notClothingHint: Image doesn't appear to be clothing or a sellable item. Try uploading photos of the item you want to list.

empty.hint: Upload photos and provide basic details to see your optimized Vinted listing here.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get optimized Vinted listings in a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Text: Add up to 20 photos of your item. Our AI analyzes them to detect style, brand, and details.
howItWorks.step2Text: Choose the item condition and optionally add product type or brand to improve the result.
howItWorks.step3Text: Click Generate Listing. AI creates a title, description, suggested price, and tags for Vinted.
howItWorks.step4Text: Copy the suggested title and description, then paste them into the Vinted app to list your item.

features.seoDesc: Titles designed to show up first in Vinted searches.
features.visualDesc: Our AI detects fabric patterns, cuts, and key details automatically.
features.copyDesc: Paste directly into the Vinted app and sell 2x faster.

footer.showLove: Show me some love on my Vinted
footer.copyright: Vinted Analyzer. Not affiliated with Vinted Ltd.
